div.p: Engineering Specification: Compensation Log Record (CLR) undo_next_lsn allows recovery to bypass already-processed undo operations.

ol.li: Phase 1 (Undo Start): Transaction encounters UPDATE record at LSN 200.
Phase 2 (Logging): Systems performs compensation (undo), then writes CLR at LSN 250.
Mapping: CLR.undo_next_lsn is set to UPDATE.prev_lsn (Value: 150).
Phase 3 (Crash Recovery): Recovery engine finds CLR (250). Instead of following CLR.prev_lsn, it jumps to CLR.undo_next_lsn (150).
Effect: Record at LSN 200 is never re-undone, preventing double-undo corruptions.
